text: The patient is positioned in the genopectoral position with bent hips and knees for a right posterior retroperitoneoscopic adrenalectomy. A transverse incision is made below the tip of the twelfth rib, followed by blunt and sharp dissection to access the retroperitoneal space. A small cavity is prepared digitally for the insertion of a 5mm trocar laterally beneath the eleventh rib, and a 10mm trocar medially below the twelfth rib. A blunt trocar with an inflatable balloon and adjustable sleeve is introduced into the initial incision site and secured.
